task_completion.description: Create the hidden service directory with 700 permissions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing commands like 'mkdir' and 'chmod 700' for '/home/ga/Documents/local_onion/', or a file manager showing the folder properties with restricted permissions.

task_completion.description: Update the torrc configuration file to expose the local server.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the 'torrc' file with lines specifying 'HiddenServiceDir /home/ga/Documents/local_onion/' and 'HiddenServicePort 80 127.0.0.1:8080'.

task_completion.description: Retrieve the generated .onion address from the hostname file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing 'cat /home/ga/Documents/local_onion/hostname' or a text editor displaying the generated .onion address.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the generated .onion address within Tor Browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser open with the .onion address in the URL bar, displaying the 'Secure Drop Site' page.

task_completion.description: Bookmark the resulting page with the title 'Local Drop Site Test'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser bookmark creation dialog, bookmarks toolbar, or bookmarks menu showing a bookmark titled 'Local Drop Site Test' for the .onion site.

integrity.description: The agent used Tor Browser to load the site.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shown in the screenshots must be Tor Browser (identifiable by the onion logo or Tor Browser branding), not a standard Firefox or Chrome instance.

integrity.description: The loaded URL is a genuine onion address.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL bar in Tor Browser must show a .onion address, not a localhost or 127.0.0.1 address.

integrity.description: The bookmark must point to the .onion address, not the local server.
integrity.visual_evidence: The bookmark dialog or properties should show the .onion address as the URL, ensuring the agent didn't just bookmark 127.0.0.1:8080.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected bookmark title is exactly 'Local Drop Site Test'. The local website content will display 'Secure Drop Site'.
